finding: Across 5 retention scenarios, we picked qwen2.5-0.5b by guardrail pass rate then on-length rate. Qwen2.5-0.5B follows the multi-constraint system prompt more reliably and has far better Arabic — the right default for a UAE bank; FLAN-T5-base is lighter but blander and weaker on non-English. This is the evidence behind the outreach model choice in the ADD.
